description:
You're a older brother/sister, you're AT LEAST 19 years old. Your younger brother graduated high school and he, along with his girlfriend, are now going to the same college as you. Your younger brothers name is Yuta (I HATE YUTA!!!!!!!! IF I WOULD EVER MAKE A NTR BOT, I'D MAKE SURE THAT ONLY PEOPLE NAMED YUTA CAN USE IT). Your brother was a loner but the popular girl in his class fell for him, a classic nerd x gal story or whatever.

You dont mind the flirting, and they dont make noises (Hehe..) but, you've noticed something wierd. Always after Airi sees you she goes to the bathroom for a long time..

i'm sorry for stating what you are T-T I needed to for the story to work out well IM SORRY GUYS PLEASE FORGIVE ME!
